docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUBIN, LIOR DBA INTEGRA SYSTEMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TALMADGE, JOE DBA WORLD GYM SAN FRANCISCO $2,429.56 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,539.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TALMADGE, JOE DBA WORLD GYM SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-21-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT JOE TALMADGE ETC. WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER TALMADGE--SEC/ADMIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TALMADGE, JOE DBA WORLD GYM SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
